prompt:
Generate a style image of "Reality on Paper: Opera Makeup and Costume Sketch" in a 4:5 vertical format.

The theme is [Peking Opera Female Role]. The visual depicts a cream-colored traditional opera costume design sheet clipped to a wooden drawing board, placed on a warm wood-toned workbench. A realistic adult Chinese woman naturally rises from the paper, creating a "paper coming to life" visual effect.
